Catch2 licence provenance
=========================

Component: Catch2
Version: 3.8.1
Commit: 2b60af89e23d28eefc081bc930831ee9d45ea58b
Upstream repository: https://github.com/catchorg/Catch2
Licence source: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/catchorg/Catch2/v3.8.1/LICENSE.txt
Licence: Boost Software License 1.0 (BSL-1.0)

The adjacent LICENSE.txt file is an unmodified copy of the upstream licence
from the Catch2 v3.8.1 tag. Catch2 is fetched only when BUILD_TESTING is enabled
and is not linked into the Ruwa application binary.
